name: Crockpot Sweet and Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts, boned and cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
CROCKPOT:
1. Place the vegetables at the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place chicken on top of the vegetables.
4. Combine all other ingredients (except rice) in a small bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
7. Before serving, make the rice.
8. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in microwave.
Oven:
1. Place vegetables at the bottom of a greased pan.
2. Sprinkle vegetables with tapioca.
3. Add chicken to the pan.
4. Combine all other ingredients (except rice) in a small bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover tightly with foil.
7. Bake at 300°F oven for 2 hours.
8. Before serving, make the rice.
9. Serve over rice.
